---
title: "Josefina Silva Fuentealba"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:josefinasilvafuente@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/JosefinaSilva96
---

Junior Economist with experience in international organisations, specialising in public finance and governance, quantitative policy analysis, and country-level diagnostics. Currently a Consultant at the **World Bank Group** (Prosperity Impact Lab, DECPR).

I work at the intersection of public finance, investment systems, and data-driven policy. My work includes cross-country analytics, impact evaluations, and tools to support government dialogue on public financial management and institutional reforms.

Previously, I was a **Robert S. McNamara Fellow** at the World Bank (DIME Governance), a Research Assistant at **CEMLA** (Center for Latin American Monetary Studies), and a Junior Economist at Chile's **Ministry of Health**.

I hold a Master's in Economics and Public Policy and a Bachelor's in Business and Economics from **Universidad Adolfo Ibáñez**, Santiago.

My research interests include public finance, financial inclusion, gender, and education policy. I use R, Stata, and Python for quantitative analysis.

I am a native Spanish speaker, fluent in English, and have intermediate proficiency in French.
